rows.label: qev087404_MSG0001
rows.name:
You're a lifesaver! Now we
can repair the Doll's armor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087404_MSG0005
rows.name:
Yes[ST:wide ]—Saying he had other things
to do, that he was busy[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087404_MSG0006
rows.name:
After Tatsu went to all the trouble
of gathering the materials-mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087404_MSG0007
rows.name:
Tatsu wanted him to praise
Tatsu wholeheartedly-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087404_MSG0010
rows.name:
Ah, also, he did leave
a message for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087404_MSG0011
rows.name:
"I'll show you how I work at night
too, so find me." [ST:wide ]—That's it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087404_MSG0013
rows.name: Tatsu wants to go home and sleep-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087404_MSG0014
rows.name:
Don't say that. We've come this
far, let's just see it through.[ST:wait ]
